name: @blackbelt-technology/pi-anthropic-messages
description: Anthropic-messages protocol bridge for pi. Activates for any anthropic-messages API session (Anthropic OAuth/API-key + proxy providers): canonicalizes lowercase pi core tools (read/write/bash/grep → Read/Write/Bash/Grep), namespaces custom tools under mcp__pi__, rewrites the system prompt, and translates tool-call names back inbound with defensive _ide suffix stripping. True no-op for any non-anthropic-messages session. Env overrides: PI_ANTHROPIC_MESSAGES_FORCE_CANONICAL / PI_ANTHROPIC_MESSAGES_DISABLE_CANONICAL.
